patch.value: Cache item body in metadata cache for fast keyword search

Search keyword was 617ms because every search re-read+parsed all 721 item .toon files for body text. Caching body in front-matter cache (CACHE_VERSION 3 -> 4) reduces warm search to ~140ms (77% speedup). Cold first run rebuilds cache once.
warm search command profile ~140ms (5x faster); list profile unchanged; pm health remains ok; cache invalidates correctly when item file changes.
